records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe she got rid of the Hollow God and the C.O.s with just one swing of her sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe she got rid of the Hollow God and the C.O.s with just one swing of her sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe she got rid of the Hollow God and the C.O.s with just one swing of her sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To exact such strength... she must've sacrificed a part of her power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To exact such strength... she must've sacrificed a part of her power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To exact such strength... she must've sacrificed a part of her power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Parry! There you are!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Parry! There you are!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Parry! There you are!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something incredible just happened!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something incredible just happened!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something incredible just happened!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hero appeared in front of me and swung the broken sword! It sparkled like twinkling stars then swept away everything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hero appeared in front of me and swung the broken sword! It sparkled like twinkling stars then swept away everything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hero appeared in front of me and swung the broken sword! It sparkled like twinkling stars then swept away everything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I know, I saw it too. So calm down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I know, I saw it too. So calm down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I know, I saw it too. So calm down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And then she... turned back into the broken sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And then she... turned back into the broken sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And then she... turned back into the broken sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that as the dimensional passage with the Normalside connected, the memories resonated with the original body and awakened on their own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that as the dimensional passage with the Normalside connected, the memories resonated with the original body and awakened on their own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that as the dimensional passage with the Normalside connected, the memories resonated with the original body and awakened on their own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the memory took the form of an incarnation probably due to the influence of the Qlipha energy flowing from the passage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the memory took the form of an incarnation probably due to the influence of the Qlipha energy flowing from the passage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the memory took the form of an incarnation probably due to the influence of the Qlipha energy flowing from the passage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? Qlipha? Incarnation? I don't understand any of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? Qlipha? Incarnation? I don't understand any of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? Qlipha? Incarnation? I don't understand any of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. It doesn't matter if you didn't understand a thing I just said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. It doesn't matter if you didn't understand a thing I just said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. It doesn't matter if you didn't understand a thing I just said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, all that matters is that you are safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, all that matters is that you are safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, all that matters is that you are safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm happy to see you again, Parry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm happy to see you again, Parry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm happy to see you again, Parry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shall we go back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shall we go back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shall we go back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... Hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... Hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Isn't that the flower ring?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Isn't that the flower ring?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Isn't that the flower ring?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to leave it behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to leave it behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to leave it behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the swords of the other Administration people, I want to leave Mother's name at the graveyard that we will remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the swords of the other Administration people, I want to leave Mother's name at the graveyard that we will remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the swords of the other Administration people, I want to leave Mother's name at the graveyard that we will remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother didn't have a sword, but I'll be able to remember her with this single Calendula flower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother didn't have a sword, but I'll be able to remember her with this single Calendula flower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother didn't have a sword, but I'll be able to remember her with this single Calendula flower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need a flower ring anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need a flower ring anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need a flower ring anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your comrades are waiting for us, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your comrades are waiting for us, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your comrades are waiting for us, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Goodbye, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Goodbye, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Goodbye, Pavlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May you rest in peace next to your comrades... in this life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: May you rest in peace next to your comrades... in this life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: May you rest in peace next to your comrades... in this life.
